text:
Created attachment 163695
svn diff to UNBREAK sysutils/cronolog-devel

I found I had the source for this, when I saw it was
listed as BROKEN. So I'll mirror the source so the
port won't be broken.
While here, take MAINTAINER, and provide a WWW.

That's it!

Please see svn diff attached, for details.

Thanks!

--Chris
